impact: The supervisor reconciles stale calling_llm/applying_files status with the dead worker process, returns the task to pending, records the repair, and restarts the daemon without waiting for manual cleanup.
summary: Reset dead-worker in-progress task before restart.
target_task: Built-in supervisor fallback: daemon process is not running but status is still calling_llm on Task checkbox-242: Add processor-suite execution integration under ppd/crawler proving public PP&D pages and PDFs flow through archive manifests, normalized document records, PDF metadata, requirement batches, and formal-logic source evidence IDs before agent reuse.; reset the in-progress task before restart

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
